subcodes.first_line: The trials and tribulations that have befallen you are evident and manifest before this Wronged Prisoner, yet that which in the path of God hath [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بلایا و رزایای شما نزد این مسجون مظلوم واضح و مشهود است ولکن آنچه در سبیل الهی بر
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
